en: And why is Thomas upset with us?
Thomas is upset because I've postponed a date for the second time,
ko: 토마스는 내가 두 번째로 약속을 미뤘기 때문에 화가 났어.

en: so I could come and be here and meet guys.
ko: 그래서 여기 와서 남자들을 만날 수 있었어.

en: I'm getting blamed for everything! Is he your boyfriend?
No, no, we have not been on a date yet.
ko: 아니, 아니, 우리는 아직 데이트를 한 적이 없어.

en: So what did you put him on for the first time?
My sister, and this time Kylie. OK, you know that book Not That Into You?
But are you into him? You don't know?
Clearly not that into him. She's fobbed him off twice.
ko: 분명히 그에게 그렇게 관심이 없는 것 같아.

en: Can I suggest you take him out tomorrow night when this is on?
ko: 내일 밤 이때 그를 데리고 나가보는 건 어때?

en: This is a story all about how my life got flipped.
ko: 이 이야기는 내 인생이 어떻게 뒤바뀌었는지에 대한 이야기야.

en: Don't you dare! Don't you dare!
Hello, who's there? Hello, sir. Hello. What's your name?
OK, and where are you from? I'm from Durham. Durham?
ko: 좋아, 어디서 왔어요? 더럼에서 왔어요. 더럼?

en: All right, but you live here now? Yes. OK, very good. Off you go with your story, Thomas.
ko: 알겠어, 그런데 지금 여기 살고 있어? 네. 좋아, 아주 좋아.
